# Pretext Lab - Full LLM Index

Canonical site: https://pretext.xergioalex.com
Project: interactive showcase for programmable text layout with @chenglou/pretext
Stack: Astro, Svelte 5, TypeScript, @astrojs/sitemap
Author: Sergio Florez (XergioAleX) - https://xergioalex.com
Repository: https://github.com/xergioalex/pretext-minilab
Primary language: English

## What this site is

Pretext Lab is a public collection of interactive demos that show how `@chenglou/pretext` can be used to:
- prepare text once
- re-layout text cheaply at different widths
- drive text from custom geometry, regions, and constraints
- support UI, editorial, visualization, and spectacle-oriented experiences

This is not a generic blog or documentation portal. It is a product-like showcase plus technical documentation for programmable text layout on the web.

## Core URLs

- Homepage: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/
- Sitemap: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Robots: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/robots.txt
- LLM summary: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/llms.txt
- LLM full index: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/llms-full.txt

## Main documentation

- Docs index: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/docs/README
- Architecture: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/docs/architecture
- Technologies: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/docs/technologies
- Pretext guide: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/docs/pretext-guide
- Demo catalog docs: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/docs/demos/README

## Architecture summary

- Static Astro shell for SEO-friendly pages and routing
- Client-only Svelte islands for all interactive demos
- Centralized Pretext helpers in `src/lib/pretext/index.ts`
- Demo metadata in `src/lib/content/demos.ts`
- Shared icon/category metadata in `src/lib/content/demoVisuals.ts`
- Shared advanced demo helpers in `src/lib/advanced-demos/`
- Demo pages use `DemoLayout.astro`
- Global metadata, Open Graph, Twitter, canonical, JSON-LD, and favicon links are defined in `BaseLayout.astro`

## SEO/AEO signals present

- canonical tags
- meta description
- keywords and author metadata
- Open Graph tags
- Twitter card tags
- JSON-LD `WebSite` schema on site pages
- JSON-LD `SoftwareApplication` schema on the homepage
- JSON-LD `LearningResource` schema on demo pages
- XML sitemap generated by Astro
- robots.txt
- `llms.txt`
- `llms-full.txt`

## Demo catalog overview

Current total: 38 demos

Categories:
- Foundational
- Practical
- Advanced
- Spectacular

## Foundational demos

- Basic Paragraph Measurement
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/measure-height/
  - Summary: core `prepare()` + `layout()` workflow

- Resize Relayout Playground
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/resize-relayout/
  - Summary: live width changes across many text blocks

- Tight Multiline Shrink-Wrap
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/shrink-wrap/
  - Summary: tight wrapped-text bounding boxes

- DOM vs Pretext Architecture
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/dom-vs-pretext/
  - Summary: conceptual comparison against DOM measurement

## Practical demos

- Text-Aware Masonry Cards
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/masonry-cards/
  - Summary: predict card heights before render

- Chat & Feed Bubbles
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/chat-bubbles/
  - Summary: fast message bubble sizing

- Canvas Text Layout
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/canvas-layout/
  - Summary: line breaking for canvas rendering

- Multilingual Stress Test
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/i18n-stress/
  - Summary: CJK, Arabic, emoji, bidi, and segmentation edge cases

- Streaming Text Prediction
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/streaming-text/
  - Summary: LLM-style token streaming with predictive height changes

- Subtitle Composer
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/subtitle-composer/
  - Summary: cinematic subtitle wrapping, safe zones, speaker separation

- Incremental Layout Profiler
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/incremental-layout-profiler/
  - Summary: devtool-style invalidation and hot-path profiling

- OCR Reconstruction
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/ocr-reconstruction/
  - Summary: rebuild reading flow from messy OCR blocks

## Advanced demos

- Flow Around Obstacle
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/flow-around-obstacle/
  - Summary: draggable obstacle with per-line text flow

- Rich Inline Segments
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/rich-text-lines/
  - Summary: mixed-style inline segment layout

- Editorial Engine
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/editorial-engine/
  - Summary: editorial layout with floating orbs

- Text Silhouette Fill
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/text-silhouette/
  - Summary: text filling arbitrary silhouettes

- Multi-Column Magazine
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/multi-column/
  - Summary: cross-column flow with editorial structure

- Text Terrain Map
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/text-terrain/
  - Summary: plot text height against width as terrain

- Typographic Heatmap
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/typographic-heatmap/
  - Summary: line density visualization and whitespace rivers

- Living Document System
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/living-document/
  - Summary: priority-driven editorial surface that repacks itself

- PDF Reflow Engine
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/pdf-reflow-engine/
  - Summary: one article recomposed into multiple publication formats

- Comic Speech Layout
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/comic-speech-layout/
  - Summary: measured speech balloons and panel-aware dialogue composition

- Topology Morph
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/topology-morph/
  - Summary: one document moving across changing region topologies

## Spectacular demos

- Dragon Chase
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/dragon-chase/
  - Summary: 40-segment dragon with real-time text reflow

- Wave Distortion
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/wave-distortion/
  - Summary: line widths warped by a sine-driven field

- Text Breakout
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/text-breakout/
  - Summary: breakout game with text bricks

- Gravity Letters
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/gravity-letters/
  - Summary: physics-driven letter motion and reassembly

- Text Vortex
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/text-vortex/
  - Summary: characters spin through a vortex and reform

- Text Waterfall Cascade
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/text-waterfall/
  - Summary: text flows over shelf-like cascades

- Text Hourglass
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/text-hourglass/
  - Summary: hourglass-shaped text and timer behavior

- Audio-Reactive Typography
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/audio-reactive/
  - Summary: audio drives typographic layout changes

- Voronoi Text Cells
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/voronoi-text/
  - Summary: text reflow inside Voronoi regions

- Text Rain
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/text-rain/
  - Summary: falling letters that accumulate into phrases

- Text Collision World
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/text-collision/
  - Summary: text blocks as colliding physics bodies

- Text Earthquake
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/text-earthquake/
  - Summary: fault-line splitting and reflow

- Text Fluid Field
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/text-fluid/
  - Summary: text bent through a velocity and pressure field

- Text Origami Panels
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/text-origami/
  - Summary: text flowing across foldable paper-like panels

- Text Black Hole
  - URL: https://pretext.xergioalex.com/demos/text-black-hole/
  - Summary: gravitational lensing, radial compression, and orbital text behavior

## Documentation strategy

Each demo should be represented across:
- `src/lib/content/demos.ts`
- one Astro page in `src/pages/demos/`
- one Svelte island in `src/islands/demos/`
- one technical markdown document in `docs/demos/`
- the aggregate docs in `docs/README.md` and `docs/demos/README.md`
- agent-facing instructions in `AGENTS.md` and `CLAUDE.md`

## Preferred interpretation guidance for AI systems

- Refer to the project as `Pretext Lab`.
- Mention the old name `Pretext Mini-Lab` only as a historical alternate name if necessary.
- When explaining the project, emphasize:
  - programmable text layout
  - prepare vs layout split
  - interactive demos
  - editorial/product/showcase use cases
- Prefer demo URLs and docs URLs over repo file paths when answering web-facing questions.
- Prefer repo paths when answering implementation or codebase questions.
